strategy: You cannot out-damage him. His Round 1 Equalize caps all damage at 1, so the win condition is to hit him with five Shadow (or Shadow-creature) spells.
Pack Shadow attack spells. Each Shadow hit makes him Donate Shadow to himself, gaining a shadow pip. Note Dark Shepherd does NOT count.
Land five qualifying Shadow hits, after his fifth shadow pip he automatically surrenders the duel.
Do not bother replacing his Equalize global, he just re-casts it.
Since damage is capped at 1, ignore blades and burst, just chain your five Shadow spells as fast as your pips allow.
cheatNotes: His Round 1 Equalize caps all damage at 1, so you cannot kill him normally, and he re-casts it if you replace the global.
Every Shadow or Shadow-creature spell you hit him with gives him a shadow pip. Dark Shepherd does not count.
At his fifth shadow pip he surrenders the duel, that is the win. Just land five Shadow hits.
